channel.title: Kissimmee Planning Advisory Board - Public Notices
channel.description: Public notices for Kissimmee Planning Advisory Board meetings and proceedings

item.title: Miscellaneous Notices - Kissimmee
item.description:
LEGAL ADVERTISEMENT OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1) ITB-26-15927-PC Ventura Elementary Sidewalk Project Community Deve...
--- Full Notice Text --- LEGAL ADVERTISEMENT OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1) ITB-26-15927-PC Ventura Elementary Sidewalk Project Community Development Block Grant Funded - #B-24-UC-12-0020. The solicitation document and any addenda can be accessed and downloaded from VendorLink at the following web address: Vendorlink.osceola.org. A VIRTUAL Non-Mandatory Pre-Bid Conference will be held on Tuesday, June 23, 2026, at 1:00 PM Local Time via the Microsoft TEAMS Application. Dial-in using (407)-906-2344, and when prompted enter the Conference Code: 120 119 455#. Please note the meeting will be audio recorded. The deadline for questions is Wednesday, July 1, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, July 14, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Paul Callaway (407) -742-0932. 2) PS-26-15955-PC Design Services for the Cypress Parkway Sidewalk Project Funded by Community Development Block Grant (CDBG) #B-25-UC-12-0020. The solicitation document and any addenda can be accessed and downloaded from VendorLink at the following web address: Vendorlink.osceola.org. A VIRTUAL Non-Mandatory Pre-Proposal Conference will be held on Thursday, June 25, 2026, at 11:00 AM Local Time via the Microsoft TEAMS Application. Dial-in using (407) 906-2344, and when prompted enter the Conference Code: 898 316 89#. Please note the meeting will be audio recorded. The deadline for questions is Wednesday, July 1, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, July 14, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Paul Callaway (407)-742-0932. FOR MORE INFORMATION, VISIT OSCEOLA COUNTYS VENDORLINK WEB SITE AT http://vendorlink.osceola.org. June 18, 2026

item.title: Miscellaneous Notices - Orlando
item.description:
OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS 1
--- Full Notice Text --- OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS 1. ITB-26-15927-PC Ventura Elementary Sidewalk Project Community Development Block Grant Funded - #B-24-UC-12-0020. The solicitation document and any addenda can be accessed and downloaded from VendorLink at the following web address: Vendorlink.osceola.org. A VIRTUAL Non-Mandatory Pre-Bid Conference will be held on Tuesday, June 23, 2026, at 1:00 PM Local Time via the Microsoft TEAMS Application. Dial-in using (407)-906-2344, and when prompted enter the Conference Code: 120 119 455#. Please note the meeting will be audio recorded. The deadline for questions is Wednesday, July 1, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, July 14, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Paul Callaway (407) -742-0932. 2. PS-26-15955-PC Design Services for the Cypress Parkway Sidewalk Project Funded by Community Development Block Grant (CDBG) #B-25-UC-12-0020. The solicitation document and any addenda can be accessed and downloaded from VendorLink at the following web address: Vendorlink.osceola.org. A VIRTUAL Non-Mandatory Pre-Proposal Conference will be held on Thursday, June 25, 2026, at 11:00AM Local Time via the Microsoft TEAMS Application. Dial-in using (407)-906-2344, and when prompted enter the Conference Code: 898 316 89#. Please note the meeting will be audio recorded. The deadline for questions is Wednesday, July 1, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, July 14, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Paul Callaway (407)-742-0932. FOR MORE INFORMATION, VISIT OSCEOLA COUNTYS VENDORLINK WEB SITE AT http://vendorlink.osceola.org. 88311 6/14/2026

item.title: Miscellaneous Notices - Kissimmee
item.description:
LEGAL ADVERTISEMENT OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1) RFP-26-15883-JG Prequalification of Contractors for Continuing Park...
--- Full Notice Text --- LEGAL ADVERTISEMENT OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1) RFP-26-15883-JG Prequalification of Contractors for Continuing Parks, Conservation Areas, and Lake Management Activities on a Task Authorization Basis. There will be no Pre-Proposal Conference for this project. Deadline for Questions: Thursday, June 4, 2026, at 12:00 PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, June 23, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Jovany Galarza - (407) 742-0943. 2) PS-26-15841-PC Boardwalk on Pleasant Hill Professional Services for Master Planning, Engineering, and Permitting. The solicitation document and any addenda can be accessed and downloaded from VendorLink at the following web address: Vendorlink.osceola.org. A VIRTUAL Non-Mandatory Pre-Proposal Conference will be held on Tuesday, June 2, 2026, at 10:00 AM Local Time via the Microsoft TEAMS Application. Dial-in using (407)-906-2344, and when prompted enter the Conference Code: 913 024 007#. Please note the meeting will be audio recorded. The deadline for questions is Wednesday, June 10, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, June 23, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Paul Callaway (407) -742-0932. 3) RFP-26-15878-PC Homeowner Inspection Services. The solicitation document and any addenda can be accessed and downloaded from VendorLink at the following web address: Vendorlink.osceola.org. A VIRTUAL Non-Mandatory Pre-Proposal Conference will be held on Tuesday, June 2, 2026, at 12:30 PM Local Time via the Microsoft TEAMS Application. Dial-in using (407)-906-2344, and when prompted enter the Conference Code: 524 569 1281#. Please note the meeting will be audio recorded. The deadline for questions is Wednesday, June 10, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, June 23, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Paul Callaway (407) -742-0932. FOR MORE INFORMATION, VISIT OSCEOLA COUNTYS VENDORLINK WEB SITE AT http://vendorlink.osceola.org. May 28, 2026
